data.body: Fixed: added ticket-init.sh call to sprint-list-epics.sh when tracker dir missing and TICKETS_TRACKER_DIR not set. Root cause: script bypassed the ticket dispatcher _ensure_initialized() that creates the worktree symlink. Found same anti-pattern in sprint-next-batch.sh (cb6a-8b22) and purge-non-project-tickets.sh (126b-369d).
